message:
fix(geo,cluster,function): validate GEOSEARCH dual-center/shape, enforce subcommand arity

GEOSEARCH/GEOSEARCHSTORE now reject both FROMLONLAT+FROMMEMBER and
both BYRADIUS+BYBOX with proper error messages. CLUSTER KEYSLOT,
GETKEYSINSLOT, COUNTKEYSINSLOT enforce exact arity. CLUSTER RESET
validates HARD/SOFT. FUNCTION DELETE enforces exact arity. FUNCTION
FLUSH and SCRIPT FLUSH reject invalid mode arguments. (2676 cases)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ Non-negotiable policy:

 | Replication baseline | in_progress | state/offset progression scaffolded; protocol sync semantics pending |
 | ACL/config mode split | in_progress | ACL command subsystem implemented (AUTH, ACL SETUSER/GETUSER/DELUSER/LIST/WHOAMI/CAT/GENPASS/LOG); CONFIG GET/SET implemented in fr-runtime with full glob pattern matching and multi-pattern support; full parameter surface pending |
